events.content: Fix FUSE WebSocket invalidator to read the refreshed mount HTTP token: Fix FUSE WebSocket invalidator to read the refreshed mount HTTP token

raw.question: Fix FUSE WebSocket invalidator to read the refreshed mount HTTP token
raw.chosen: Fix FUSE WebSocket invalidator to read the refreshed mount HTTP token
raw.reasoning: PR refreshes the mount HTTP client from creds-file on 401, but FUSE invalidation was still constructed with cfg.token and would reconnect with stale credentials after rotation.

retrospective.summary: Reviewed PR #252 credential-file token refresh changes; fixed FUSE WebSocket invalidator to source refreshed tokens from the mount HTTP client; verified targeted packages and full Go suite.
